title: 1000 Ways to Explode:tnt
description: This modpack is full of explosive chaos with TNT cannons, orbital strikes, and many powerful destruction tools. Build massive weapons and turn your Minecraft world into total destruction and mayhem.
body:
TNT Orbital Strike Cannon is a chaotic Minecraft modpack focused on powerful explosives and massive destruction tools. It includes TNT cannons, orbital strike abilities, and other overpowered weapons designed to blow up terrain and enemies with ease.

This modpack is made for players who enjoy fast-paced chaos, huge explosions, and turning the entire world into total devastation.
!WARING u game might crash of tnt
1.Orbital Strike Cannon | DataPack | Mod | Plugin
🎣 How to Use
Take the fishing rod

Right-click to call the orbital strike

Or look at a target and use stab-charge to blast instantly in that direction

Enjoy the carnage.

STAB CHARGE
Commands
/function orbital:give/stab_1
/function orbital:give/stab_2
/function orbital:give/stab_3
STAB CHARGE AIM
Commands
STAB CHARGE AIM + INF
Commands
NUKE CHARGE
Commands
NUKE CHARGE AIM
Commands
CINEMATIC NUKE
Commands
TOGGLE AUTHOR MESSAGE
Commands
TOGGLE CRAFT
Commands
